lines: Application acceptance A.Y. 2019-20 has been extended till 15th January 2020. Please refer the notice section for more details.
Citizen Charter is now live on MahaDBT Portal-
Users can check the expected timelines for application approval and download the Charter for detailed information.
Granular Application Tracking is now live on MahaDBT Portal-
Users can now track application to view real-time status and monitor progress at every stage of their application.
वैद्यकीय शिक्षण आणि औषधी द्रव्ये विभाग
सामाजिक न्याय व विशेष सहाय्य विभाग
